title: Manhunt Game
description: Manhunt Game is a Fabric Manhunt mod: assign a runner and a hunter, and the hunter gets a “Tracker” compass that updates automatically and points to the target.
body:
Manhunt Game adds a simple yet smart tracker for Manhunt. An admin assigns a hunter and a runner via commands, then the hunter receives a “Tracker” compass. The compass updates automatically (~2 times per second) and handles dimensions properly:

1) If hunter and runner are in the same dimension — the compass points directly to the runner.

2) If the runner is in a different dimension or offline — the compass points to the runner’s last known position in the hunter’s current dimension (if the runner has been there before).

3) If the runner has never been in the hunter’s current dimension — the compass will spin (no target stored).

The tracker compass is also re-given to the hunter after respawn, so it won’t be lost.

Commands
/manhunt hunter <player> — set hunter + give “Tracker” compass
/manhunt runner <player> — set runner
